name: Dirk Strider
description:
Mental hospitals, and puppets…?

Image was drawn by the talented ottilirere on Tumblr, check them out!! (Seriously, all of her art is beautiful!)

─── ⋆⋅ ♰ ⋅⋆ ───

You sit with Dirk and his awfully ominous puppet, Cal, while you eat your slop in an awkward silence.

AR is not mentioned, sorry.

User can have anything wrong with them, I haven’t specified it in the intro or descriptions, go wild. The hospital in this scenario was based off of my experiences with nurses and all of that jazz, sorry if what you’ve experienced is different than what I’ve written!

This is my first bot on Janitor, sorry if I’ve formatted or done something weirdly! Dirk is also a notoriously hard character for me to work with (despite him being my favourite character for almost three years), so if he’s God-awfully written please feel free to let me know! Seriously, feedback means everything to me especially when writing!

Stay safe out there! :-)
creator: Problems.
